name: Delilah Koplin
ai_summary: Delilah Koplin has 13 years of childcare experience as a special education paraprofessional in elementary school, working with children from newborns to age 13 with flexible availability around her school schedule. She approaches conflict resolution by teaching empathy and kindness, and believes her supportive, playful approach makes her a great fit for helping kids feel comfortable and reach milestones.
